data.title: Auctane appoints Josh Steinitz as Chief Strategy Officer, bringing expertise in logistics and global operations.
data.description: A global company based in Austin, Texas, Auctane, has appointed Josh Steinitz as its Chief Strategy Officer (CSO). Auctane provides intelligent mailing and shipping solutions through trusted products like ShipStation, Stamps.com, Metapack, and Packlink. Steinitz, known for his distinguished career in travel and logistics, aims to leverage his expertise in global operations, logistics, and partnerships to drive Auctane's strategic initiatives. This move is set to enhance Auctane's position in the market and capitalize on Steinitz's wealth of experience in the industry.

data.title: NiCE to host Capital Markets Day on Nov 17, 2025 in NYC at Convene 75 Rockefeller Plaza. Includes presentations on long-term strategy, CX Innovation Roadmap with Cognigy, and financial outlook.
data.description: NiCE (Nasdaq: NICE) will be holding a Capital Markets Day on November 17, 2025, at Convene 75 Rockefeller Plaza in New York City. The event will showcase presentations from the executive management team regarding the company's long-term strategy and the future of the CX market, the CX Innovation Roadmap with Cognigy, as well as a financial overview and mid-term outlook. For those interested in attending or seeking more information, please reach out for details.

data.title: Incredible Health introduces AI agents Gale and Lyn to revolutionize healthcare hiring, benefitting 1M+ workers and 1,500 employers.
data.description: A leading healthcare career marketplace, Incredible Health, based in San Francisco, introduced two AI voice agents named Gale and Lyn, aimed at revolutionizing healthcare hiring processes. These agents are tailored to enhance the hiring experience for healthcare workers and employers by providing personalized, dependable, and swift services. With the support of over 1 million nurses and technicians in the U.S. and 1,500 healthcare employers, these AI agents are set to transform the recruitment landscape. Trusted AI technology is utilized to streamline hiring processes on the platform.
Vox set to raise $55M in public offering for common shares.
ARGENTINA PESO JUMPS, DOLLAR BONDS SURGE AS US DETAILS SUPPORT

data.title: LiverRight Announces Medical Advisory Board and Founding Members
data.description: Cincinnati, September 24, 2025 - LiverRight, the nation's exclusive National Virtual Clinic focused on diagnosing and treating liver diseases in adult patients, has recently appointed Naim Alkhouri, MD and Rashmee Patil, MD as advisors to enhance its services. This move comes as part of the clinic's ongoing effort to expand its expertise and improve patient care. LiverRight stands out as the only Virtual Clinic in the country dedicated to addressing liver ailments patients face, offering specialized medical attention.

data.title: New Energy Risk partners with Alliant for Texas solar project, expands into tax credit market.
data.description: Avon, Connecticut – A collaboration with Alliant has been established to back a solar project in Texas, signifying the extension of NER's insurance expertise into the tax credit sector.

data.title: Desay SV expands intelligent driving solutions to overseas markets; announces IPU14 domain controller at IAA Mobility 2025.
data.description: Desay SV, during the International Motor Show Germany on September 10, 2025, revealed plans to broaden its intelligent driving solutions globally. The company declared that its IPU14 domain controller will now be available in overseas markets. This move showcases Desay SV's commitment to expanding its reach beyond domestic boundaries.

data.title: Instabug rebrands as Luciq.ai, introducing Agentic Mobile Observability, shifting focus to proactive issue resolution.
data.description: In San Francisco, the prominent AI-powered mobile observability platform, Instabug, revealed its rebranding as Luciq.ai, introducing a fresh category named Agentic Mobile Observability. The company's transition signifies a shift from passive monitoring to an AI-centric platform where smart agents actively identify, troubleshoot, and address problems. This transformation allows mobile teams to prioritize enhancing user experiences by resolving issues efficiently. The new brand, pronounced as "LOO-sik," aims to emphasize this innovative approach in the industry.

data.title: ROI·DNA chosen as Qualtrics' global digital advertising partner, leading paid media strategy for growth and engagement.
data.description: In San Francisco, ROI·DNA, a Hotwire Global company and a full-service B2B digital marketing agency, revealed that it has secured the position of global digital advertising partner for Qualtrics, a prominent creator in the experience management (XM) category. This collaboration will involve ROI·DNA overseeing paid media strategy and implementation worldwide and in local markets to support Qualtrics in enhancing growth and improving connections with crucial target groups. Qualtrics opted for ROI·DNA after a rigorous selection process, highlighting the significant importance of this partnership.

data.title: Stablecorp secures $5M CAD to expand QCAD stablecoin infrastructure for compliant cross-border payments.
data.description: A recent announcement states that Stablecorp, a prominent Canadian financial technology company, has secured new funding to expedite the launch of QCAD, Canada's fully-reserved and audit-ready stablecoin. This move is aimed at satisfying the increasing need for compliant, constant, cross-border payments and digital capital markets. The capital injection will help address the rising demand for QCAD services amidst a fast-changing financial landscape.

data.title: Bank of America donates $1 million+ to LiftFund for Hill Country flood recovery, aiding small businesses in Texas.
data.description: In an effort to assist small businesses in disaster-stricken areas of Texas, LiftFund, a prominent nonprofit lender, disclosed a substantial partnership with Bank of America on Sept. 24, 2025. This funding injection is set to bolster relief efforts as deadlines for other aid options draw near. The commitment is projected to support a substantial number of small businesses in their recovery process.

data.title: Daphne Utilities in Alabama has joined the Alabama Purchasing Group to streamline procurement; the group is powered by Bidnet Direct by SOVRA.
data.description: In Daphne, Alabama, on September 24, 2025, Daphne Utilities made an announcement that it has become a part of the Alabama Purchasing Group. This e-procurement solution, operated by Bidnet Direct by SOVRA, is aimed at aiding government agencies throughout Alabama in handling bids and vendor management efficiently. The collaboration will offer a centralized system to streamline these processes.

data.title: Charter Next Generation launches GreenArrow™ Matte-Finish MDO-PE Print Film, improving shelf appeal and recyclability.
data.description: A leading sustainable material science solutions provider, Charter Next Generation (CNG), based in Chicago, introduced a new high-performance matte MDO-PE film on September 24, 2025. This innovative film offers differentiated shelf appeal and is recyclable through Store Drop-Off programs. The product, part of the GreenArrow™ range, aims to promote sustainability in packaging.

data.title: Charlotte Tilbury makes U.S. debut in Amazon Premium Beauty Store, offering award-winning beauty products to millions. NYC, Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: Charlotte's renowned beauty products, beloved worldwide for their award-winning status, can now be accessed with ease through a simple click on Amazon's U.S. store. This collaboration marks a significant milestone as Charlotte's beauty innovations are now made available to millions of customers in the U.S. This exciting partnership between a beauty trailblazer and a retail giant aims to expand the reach of Charlotte's iconic products across the country. The development was announced in New York on September 24, 2025.

data.title: Diodes Inc introduces AL58818Q and AL58812Q - 18-/12-channel linear LED drivers for automotive lighting. Optimal for various applications beyond lighting.
data.description: A leading semiconductor manufacturer, Diodes Incorporated, has unveiled the AL58818Q and AL58812Q, a pair of automotive-approved linear LED drivers with 18 and 12 channels respectively. These drivers offer accurate color blending and brightness modulation, catering to applications like rear lamp modules, emblem lights, and internal ambient lighting in vehicles. Along with automotive use, they are suitable for infotainment screens, status lights, touch panels, and LCD displays. These new devices target enhancing lighting functionality in various automotive and electronic settings.

data.title: EarthTronics unveils 1x4 LED Back Light Panel in Michigan, offering glare-free illumination with high energy efficiency.
data.description: EarthTronics, a company based in Norton Shores, Michigan, has recently launched the 1x4 LED Back Light Panel. This lighting product is designed to offer uniform and glare-free illumination with exceptional luminous efficacy, promoting excellent visual acuity. The panel includes power-adjustable settings and a contemporary backlit design, combining energy efficiency, durability, and professional aesthetics for commercial applications. With a focus on delivering a positive economic and environmental impact, EarthTronics continues its commitment to developing innovative energy-efficient lighting solutions.

data.title: Affinius Capital and Axonic Capital partner for mid-market first mortgage financing in construction industry through Axonic's insurance platform.
data.description: A strategic partnership has been unveiled between Affinius Capital LLC and Axonic Capital LLC in New York. This collaboration builds upon their current partnership, combining Axonic's investment expertise with Affinius' industry network. The focus will be on providing mid-market first mortgage financing for new construction projects. The funding for these projects will be facilitated through Axonic's insurance platform. This new venture aims to capitalize on Axonic's advisory services and Affinius' sourcing capabilities within the construction sector to deliver comprehensive financial solutions.

data.title: 5th Seoul Biennale of Architecture in Seoul, South Korea from Sept 26 to Nov 18 aims to explore how cities can become more human.
data.description: Taking place in Seoul, South Korea, the 5th Seoul Biennale of Architecture and Urbanism is scheduled to run from September 26 to November 18. Attendees are encouraged to explore ways in which cities can prioritize humanity. The event aims to delve into urban development and architecture, attracting a diverse audience to engage in discussions and innovative ideas.

data.title: Renters expect property managers to offer energy-efficient solutions as utility costs rise. SmartRent survey report released. #energyefficiency
data.description: In Phoenix, SmartRent unveiled findings from a recent survey highlighting energy management trends in rental housing. The study examined important statistics and insights regarding this issue, including revealing data on the adoption and impact of energy-saving practices within the rental housing sector.
